# b00tl3gRSA2 [Hard] (by invisibility) - picoCTF 2019
> In RSA d is a lot bigger than e, why don't we use d to encrypt instead of e? Connect with <code>nc jupiter.challenges.picoctf.org 18243</code>.

```python
c= 
n= 
e= 

d = owiener.attack(e, n)

print(long_to_bytes(pow(c,d,n)).decode())
```
Wiener's attack.
